Name: insert_user_departments
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "user_id", $2::uuid AS "department_id", $3::text AS "role" UNION ALL SELECT $4::uuid AS "user_id", $5::uuid AS "department_id", $6::text AS "role") AS data WHERE data."department_id" = ANY($7::uuid[])), check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_mutation_result) >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."user_departments" ("user_id", "department_id", "role") SELECT check_mutation_result."user_id", check_mutation_result."department_id", check_mutation_result."role" FROM check_mutation_result WHERE (SELECT status FROM check_count) = 1 RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."user_id" AS "user_id", mutation_result."department_id" AS "department_id" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
